name: demo-prep
description: Turns git history into a demo-ready slide deck. Reads commits, PRs, and issues since a date or tag, asks what to focus on, and generates a tailored .pptx presentation.

interface.shortDescription: Turn your git history into a demo slide deck
interface.longDescription: Reads commits, PRs, and issues since your last demo tag or a given date. Asks what to focus on and how technical the audience is, then generates a .pptx presentation tailored to the room.
defaultPrompt: Prep my demo since last sprint.
Generate a slide deck of what I shipped this month.
Make a demo presentation for the engineering all-hands.
